info.title: Spica Backend Engine API
info.description: OpenAPI specification for the Spica Backend Engine API covering bucket, bucket-data, activity, env-var, function, function-logs, passport (apikey, identity, user, policy), storage, and versioncontrol modules.

patch.summary: Partially updates the bucket schema using JSON Merge Patch

parameters.name: relation
parameters.description: When true, relations are resolved. Can also be an array of relation field paths.

parameters.name: paginate
parameters.description: When true, response includes a meta property with total document count.

parameters.name: localize
parameters.description: When true, translated documents are localized to accept-language.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: An expression or JSON object to filter documents.

200.description: List of documents or paginated response

post.summary: Adds a new document into the bucket

get.summary: Returns profiled entries for bucket data
Returns a single document from the bucket

parameters.name: localize
parameters.description: When true, translated documents are localized to accept-language.

parameters.name: relation
parameters.description: When true, relations are resolved. Can also be an array of relation field paths.

put.summary: Replaces a document in the bucket

patch.summary: Partially updates a document using JSON merge patch

delete.summary: Removes a document from the bucket

get.summary: Returns activity logs with optional filters

parameters.name: paginate
parameters.description: When true, response includes pagination metadata.

200.description: List of environment variables or paginated response

get.summary: Returns available enqueuers, runtimes, and timeout information

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: JSON filter object. Can contain 'index' property.

patch.summary: Partially updates a function using JSON Merge Patch

delete.summary: Removes a function along with its index and dependencies

get.summary: Returns the index (code) of the function

post.summary: Replaces and compiles the index (code) of the function

get.summary: Returns dependencies of the function with their versions

post.summary: Adds one or more dependencies to the function

delete.summary: Removes a dependency from the function

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the dependency to remove

put.summary: Injects an environment variable into a function

200.description: Updated function with injected env var

delete.summary: Ejects an environment variable from a function

put.summary: Injects a secret into a function

delete.summary: Ejects a secret from a function

parameters.name: begin
parameters.description: Start date for log range (defaults to start of today UTC)

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End date for log range (defaults to end of today UTC)

parameters.name: functions
parameters.description: Array of function IDs to filter by

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Filter by log content (case-insensitive regex match)

delete.summary: Clears logs for a specific function

parameters.name: begin
parameters.description: Start date for log range to clear

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End date for log range to clear

get.summary: Returns paginated list of API keys

put.summary: Updates an API key (key field is immutable on update)
Adds a policy to an API key

200.description: Updated API key with added policy

delete.summary: Removes a policy from an API key

get.summary: Returns identities with optional pagination and filters

parameters.name: paginate
parameters.description: When true, response includes pagination metadata.

200.description: List of identities or paginated response

delete.summary: Deletes an identity (cannot delete the last identity)

put.summary: Adds a policy to an identity

delete.summary: Removes a policy from an identity

get.summary: Returns users with optional pagination and filters

parameters.name: paginate
parameters.description: When true, response includes pagination metadata.

200.description: List of users or paginated response

put.summary: Adds a policy to a user

delete.summary: Removes a policy from a user

get.summary: Returns storage objects with optional filtering and pagination

parameters.name: paginate
parameters.description: When true, response includes pagination metadata.

200.description: List of storage objects or paginated response

post.summary: Adds one or more objects into storage

delete.summary: Deletes multiple storage objects by IDs or names

schema.description: Array of object IDs (ObjectId) or names (strings)

get.summary: Returns metadata of the storage object

parameters.name: idOrName
parameters.description: ObjectId or name of the storage object

put.summary: Updates the object and content of the storage object

patch.summary: Updates metadata (name) of the storage object

delete.summary: Removes a storage object by ID or name

parameters.name: idOrName
parameters.description: ObjectId or name of the storage object

get.summary: Returns content of the storage object with HTTP caching headers

parameters.name: idOrName
parameters.description: ObjectId or name of the storage object

parameters.name: if-none-match
parameters.description: ETag value for conditional request. Returns 304 if matching.

parameters.name: cmd
parameters.description: Name of the command to execute

ApikeyAuth.name: Authorization
ApikeyAuth.description: API Key authentication. Provide the key with the 'APIKEY' prefix, e.g. 'APIKEY <your-key>'.

PolicyIdParam.name: policyId
PolicyIdParam.description: Identifier of the policy (ObjectId or predefined name)

AcceptLanguageHeader.name: accept-language
AcceptLanguageHeader.description: Language preference for translated documents (e.g. en_US, tr_TR)

LimitParam.name: limit
LimitParam.description: Maximum number of documents to return

SortParam.name: sort
SortParam.description: JSON string for sorting. Example: {"name": 1} for ascending, {"name": -1} for descending

type.description: JSON Schema type or extended type (objectid, storage, richtext, textarea, color, multiselect, relation, date, location, json, hash, encrypted)

BucketDocumentInput.description: Document body that must match the bucket schema. Properties depend on the bucket definition.

type.description: Trigger type (e.g., http, schedule, database, bucket, firehose, system)

Identity.description: Identity object (password and lastPasswords are excluded from responses)

User.description: User object (password and lastPasswords are excluded from responses)
